main_hypothesis.justification: Anchor 'biofouling lead stage 1 head post-storm + sustained FeCl3' — captura las 2 firmas concurrentes.

key_signals.justification: Conecta ΔP cabeza vs cola, TOC×2, ATP×8, T↑, SDI/turbidez↑, perm-8% con conductividad +ligera.

alternatives.justification: 3 alts (Fe FOUL, MECH compactación, SCAL) con why_discardable anclado.

recommended_action.justification: CIP alcalino+DBNPA+cítrico si needed; 'ensuring no oxidants reach the membranes' explícito.

requested_data.justification: Pide Fe total post-cartucho — match Fe total/disuelto 30d del gold.

decision_change_condition.justification: Multi-condición OR: Fe>100 + ácido recupera + alcalino no, OR ATP<200 → Fe/particulado.
